title: Eidolon:Edoni
description: A mod which adds compatibilities between Eidolon:Repraised and Farmer's Delight.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58c1f894381725b9cac48a4e23911f7f9055c0f0.png) **Eidolon:Edoni** is a mod which adds compatibilities between [Eidolon:Repraised](https://modrinth.com/mod/eidolonrepraised) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight).

Currently added above 30 new foods with unique effects and multipy compatbility features. ### Current Compatbilities: - 🧾 [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - 💧 [Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken/) - 🍢 [Barbeque's Delight [Forge/Neoforge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/barbeques-delight) - 🔪 [Chopper's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/choppers-delight) - 🍋 [Cook's Collection](https://modrinth.com/mod/cooks-collection) - 🌽 [Bountiful Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountifulharvest) - 🧛 [Vampire's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampires-delight) ### Future Plans: * 🧵 More compatbility features; * 🍽️ A mysterious new food; * 🛠️ Compatbilities for other fd addons ([Brewin' And Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin/), [My Nether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/my-nethers-delight), [Dungeons Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons_delight), etc...) ### Credits: - 🕯️ _**elucent\_**_ for creating Eidolon mod and _**[Alexthw46](https://modrinth.com/user/Alexthw46)**_ for porting it - 🍳 _**[vectorwing](https://modrinth.com/user/vectorwing)**_ for creating Farmer's Delight mod - ❤️ Special thanks to _**[LeoLezury](https://modrinth.com/user/LeoLezury)**_, _**[CloudMeow](https://modrinth.com/user/CloudMeow)**_, _**FallenSnow21**_ for giving support *** [![Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae6ec5783b7267fb894b214f62af847d59d3432d.png)](https://discord.gg/c8zY8fDYXz) ## 🔗Links [![Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d12af3bac3eac369faeb577e7ef2da2a9b4b83c.png)](https://discord.gg/c8zY8fDYXz) [![Github Source](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da6f6c568220d63db13560469bc71bf6eb2e40e4.png)](https://github.com/0Starocean0/EidolonEdoni) [![Curseforge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2609474d374a02b9d8dae34dfa0e2c523eaaffc1.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eidolon-edoni)
